title: Section 28
content: Every Apprenticeship Adviser and 1[every Additional, Joint, Regional, Deputy or Assistant Apprenticeship Adviser] appointed under this Act shall be deemed to be a public servant within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 20, ibid., for "every Deputy or Assistant Apprenticeship Advisers" (w.e.f. 1-12-1974).
